html:
Exclusive to:

The Dreaded Mudslinger is a craftable item exclusive to Wurt with the "Terra Corruption" skill. When used, it throws a swampy projectile that creates a 7×7 area of Corrupted Marsh Turf. While standing on this turf, Wurt and all Merms that are loyal to her have a 50% chance to summon a Shadow Tentacle with each attack. These tentacles do not target Wurt or her loyal Merms.

The Dreaded Mudslinger costs 20 to cast, then goes on a 8 minutes cooldown. The Corrupted Marsh Turf lasts for 2 minutes.

Unlike regular Marsh Turf, Corrupted Marsh Turf cannot be dug up, planted on, tilled with a Garden Digamajig, or used to build Wurt's structures.

Hydrous Healing II

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

Slippery Hide II

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

Gallery

  • Old Dreaded Mudslinger Dropped texture
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Corrupted Marsh Turf

Spawn Shadow Tentacle with 50% chance after every hit.
“Dreadful... but don't tell her I said that.”
–Wilson
“Heh. Why adapt to the environment if the environment can adapt to you?”
–Willow
“Why little fish girl make such scary thing?”
–Wolfgang
“Sigh. Isn't the regular swamp bad enough?”
–Wendy
“PRIMITIVE”
–WX-78
“Oh my. That looks like rather advanced magic for her reading level.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't trust it.”
–Woodie
“How heartwarming to see today's youth take an interest in shadow magic.”
–Maxwell
“The small beastie seems keen tö expand her kingdöm.”
–Wigfrid
“Wurt won't let us play with her mud wand, even after we shared our snacks!”
–Webber
“I fear something dark has stirred within our little friend.”
–Warly
“Scaly friend's sparkly stick”
–Wormwood
“Aw, she made a lil' shadow wand thing.”
–Winona
“Crafted by her scaly hand, to bring the swamp to any land.”
–Wortox
“Pretty stick!”
–Wurt
“It must be some kind of swamp witchcraft!”
–Walter
“The dark merm kingdom timeline? Again?”
–Wanda
The Dreaded Mudslinger is a craftable item exclusive to Wurt with the "Terra Corruption" skill. When used, it throws a swampy projectile that creates a 7×7 area of Corrupted Marsh Turf. While standing on this turf, Wurt and all Merms that are loyal to her have a 50% chance to summon a Shadow Tentacle with each attack. These tentacles do not target Wurt or her loyal Merms.
The Dreaded Mudslinger costs 20 to cast, then goes on a 8 minutes cooldown. The Corrupted Marsh Turf lasts for 2 minutes.
Unlike regular Marsh Turf, Corrupted Marsh Turf cannot be dug up, planted on, tilled with a Garden Digamajig, or used to build Wurt's structures.

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or Mutated Marsh Turf at a rate of 0.5/second.

The '''Dreaded Mudslinger''' is a craftable item exclusive to [[Wurt]] with the "[[Terra Corruption]]" skill. When used, it throws a swampy projectile that creates a 7×7 area of Corrupted Marsh Turf. While standing on this turf, Wurt and all [[Merms]] that are loyal to her have a 50% chance to summon a [[Shadow Tentacle]] with each attack. These tentacles do not target Wurt or her loyal Merms.

The Dreaded Mudslinger costs 20 {{Sanity}} to cast, then goes on a 8 minutes cooldown. The Corrupted Marsh Turf lasts for 2 minutes.

Unlike regular [[Marsh Turf]], Corrupted Marsh Turf cannot be dug up, planted on, tilled with a [[Garden Digamajig]], or used to build Wurt's structures.

=== {{picDark|32|Hydrous Healing II}} Hydrous Healing II ===
Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or [[Brilliant Mudslinger|Mutated Marsh Turf]] at a rate of 0.5/second.

=== {{picDark|32|Slippery Hide II}} Slippery Hide II ===
Wurt will also passively gain wetness while standing on Corrupted Marsh Turf or [[Brilliant Mudslinger|Mutated Marsh Turf]] at a rate of 0.5/second.
